name: Cache info
Cache settings
Detect offline
Format email
Parse state
Alert logic
Build telemetry point
func:
const tags = {
    zone: msg.zone, gateway_id: msg.gateway_id, serial: msg.serial,
    hw_version: msg.hw_version || '-1',
    charge_mode: msg.bat.charge_mode || 'Unknown'
};

const fields = {
    battery_voltage_mv:  msg.bat.battery_voltage_mv,
    soc_pct:             msg.bat.battery_soc_pct,
    charge_current_ma10: msg.bat.charge_current_ma10,
    charge_power_w:      msg.bat.charge_power_w,
    is_night:            msg.bat.is_night ? 1 : 0,
    energy_in_daily_wh:  msg.bat.energy_in_daily_wh,
    energy_out_daily_wh: msg.bat.energy_out_daily_wh,
    energy_retained_wh:  msg.bat.energy_retained_wh,
    load_on:             msg.load.load_on ? 1 : 0,
    lvd_active:          (msg.load.lvd_active || msg.faults.lvd_active) ? 1 : 0,
    load_current_ma10:   msg.load.load_current_ma10 * 10,
    load_power_w:        msg.load.load_power_w,
    pv_voltage_mv:       msg.pv.pv_voltage_mv,
    pv_target_voltage_mv: msg.pv.pv_target_voltage_mv,
    internal_temp_c:     msg.gen.internal_temp_c,
    external_temp_c:     msg.gen.external_temp_c,
    led_voltage_mv:      msg.led.led_voltage_mv,
    led_current_ma10: msg.led.led_current_ma10 * 10,
    led_power_w:         msg.led.power_w,
    load_state_mask:     msg.load.state_mask,
    charge_state_mask:   msg.bat.charge_state_mask,
    flags:               msg.gen.flags
};

msg.payload = [fields, tags];
return msg;

name: Build faults point
